# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Response } from '@vercel/fetch';
import { ReadableStream } from 'web-streams-polyfill/ponyfill';
import { bufferToReadable } from '@vercel/fetch/utils';

export default async function (req) {
  const { content, headers } = await req.json();

  const response = new Response(
    new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        const body = new TextEncoder().encode(content);
        const readable = bufferToReadable(body);
        readable.pipeTo(controller);
      }
    }),
    {
      headers
    }
  );

  return response;
}
